data.name: My Giant Goth Girlfriend Is a Sadist 2
data.detailed_description:
Kuroga, your 274cm tall, yandere, goth girlfriend, loves you deeply, but when she's on her period, she gets unnaturally moody, grumpy, and unhinged. Unfortunately for you, this is her time of the month, and you have to satisfy your high-maintenance girlfriend, who uses you as her personal servant to pleasure herself. If you can make it through a week of your giant, sadistic, slightly mentally unstable girlfriend's mood swings, she'll be sure to reward you afterwards.

Experience a day in the life of Kuroga as her masochistic boyfriend, who loves her just as much as she loves him, and their BDSM-femdom days together.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 20 Unique character images

  • 24 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: Experience a day in the life of Kuroga as her masochistic boyfriend, who loves her just as much as she loves him, as you try to make it through your slightly mentally unstable girlfriend's mood swings.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
